tool.name: UpdateDataSourcePerMXD
tool.displayname: Update SDE data source in a single MXD

param.name: in_mxd
param.dialogReference: Filepath and name of MXD document that with layers that need to be updated.

param.name: xwalk_fle
param.displayname: CSV file with old and new feature classes crosswalked
param.dialogReference:
A crosswalk table in a CSV or TXT file format. The tool requires two columns within this table - 'Old' and 'New'. The 'Old' column should include the full feature class name from the original enterprise geodatabase, and the 'New' column should include the new feature class name.

As an example:

Old: GIS_FEATURES.GDBA.districts_sound_transit

New: GIS_FEATURES.GDBA.DISTRICTS__rta

param.name: sde_conn
param.displayname: SDE connection for new data source
param.dialogReference: The filepath and file name of the SDE connection file for the new enterprise geodatabase data source.

param.name: out_mxd
param.displayname: File path and name where updated MXD will be saved
param.dialogReference: Filepath and name of the new MXD document which will be generated by the tool.

tool.summary: This tool will search through a single MXD document, and based on a user-supplied crosswalk (as a CSV or TXT file), update the data source for enterprise geodatabase feature layers that are specified in the crosswalk table. A new MXD file is generated by the tool.

idCitation.resTitle: Update SDE data source in a single MXD

dataIdInfo.idAbs: This tool will search through a single MXD document, and based on a user-supplied crosswalk (as a CSV or TXT file), update the data source for enterprise geodatabase feature layers that are specified in the crosswalk table. A new MXD file is generated by the tool.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: Snohomish County, Planning and Development Services (PDS)
